stemHtml: What is the purpose of a feed box in the fuel tank?

options.a: It decreases the fuel level at the boost pump location and ventilates the tank during refuelling.
options.b: It increases the fuel level at the boost pump location.
options.c: It traps fuel sediments or sludge in the lower part of the tank.
options.d: It distributes the fuel to the various tanks during refuelling.
